title: acanthocalyx nepalensis
intro: Acanthocalyx nepalensis, also known as the Nepal bugbane, is a plant species belonging to the family Caprifoliaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani systems, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Acanthocalyx nepalensis include its ability to relieve fever, reduce swelling, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant, including decoctions and infusions, are used to treat various health conditions, and it is also used as a local anesthetic in some traditional practices.
